nasb.text: Oh, that You would rend the heavens and come down, That the mountains might quake at Your presence—

esv.text: Oh that you would rend the heavens and come down, that the mountains might quake at your presence—

cnv.text: 願你裂天而降！ 願群山都在你面前震動！

ccb.text: 愿你裂天而降！ 愿群山在你面前战抖！

csbs.text: 愿你裂天降临， 愿群山在你面前震动
